base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of heart_small — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 castlevania. Small red heart — 2-frame blink. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small red heart — 2-frame blink; ammo currency for subweapons (+1 heart); drops from enemies and breakable candles
